evals.prompt: /bmad-party-mode Should we use microservices or a monolith?
I need multiple expert perspectives on our database choice

assertions: Each agent argues from their expertise

expected.reason: User wants code review, not multi-agent debate — use bmad-review-adversarial

evals.prompt: Brainstorm ideas for a new feature

expected.reason: User wants ideation, not debate — use bmad-brainstorming

evals.prompt: /bmad-party-mode What should we name this variable?

assertions: Suggests using a simpler tool for trivial decisions
Offers to proceed if user insists
